/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/src/main.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/dependencies/waywallen/bridge/src/bridge.c.o" "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/dependencies/waywallen/bridge/src/drm_fourcc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/dependencies/waywallen/bridge/src/ipc_v1.c.o" "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/dependencies/waywallen/bridge/src/probe_egl.c.o" "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/dependencies/waywallen/bridge/src/probe_vk.c.o" "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/dependencies/waywallen/bridge/src/sync_release.c.o" "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/dependencies/waywallen/bridge/src/pool.c.o" "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/dependencies/waywallen/bridge/src/pool_egl_gbm.c.o" "CMakeFiles/openrgb-waywallen-plugin.dir/dependencies/waywallen/bridge/src/pool_vulkan.c.o" -o openrgb-waywallen-plugin  -lvulkan -lgbm -lpthread
